config.stacksizeadjuster.title: Stack Size Adjuster
config.stacksizeadjuster.option.limit_64: Limit for items that normally stack to 64 (blocks, raw food, etc.). Default: 64.
config.stacksizeadjuster.option.limit_16: Limit for items that normally stack to 16 (snowballs, ender pearls, eggs). Default: 16.
Limit for items that normally do not stack (tools, armor, potions, stews). Default: 1.
gamerule.stack-size-adjuster.items_64_li: Maximum stack size for items that naturally stack to 64. Default: 64
gamerule.stack-size-adjuster.items_16_li: Maximum stack size for items that naturally stack to 16. Default: 16
gamerule.stack-size-adjuster.items_1_lim: Maximum stack size for items that naturally stack to 1. Default: 1
